About Content:
Simulation File Pusher

This is a universal PCB simulation file pusher extension that supports exporting PCB design files and pushing them to third-party simulation software.

Main Features:
• ODB++ file export and push
• Netlist file export and push
• Smart client detection
• Reliable file transfer

Version: ${1}
Author: EasyEDA Team
Connection Failed: Failed to connect to simulation tool
Upload Success: File successfully sent to simulation tool
Install Dialog Content:
Simulation tool not detected or not started.

Please ensure:
1. Simulation tool is properly installed
2. Tool supports HTTP API interface
3. Port ${1} is not occupied
WarnTip: Simulation client not detected. Please ensure the client is installed and started.
WarnTip1: For help, please click the "View Help" button.
Page Blur: Page lost focus, user may be handling confirmation dialog
Page Focus: Page regained focus, checking client status
